MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Brenda Fields: Court is not in session for 12/17/02. Counsel are work on trial related matters in their own offices and Judge Wick works on outstanding motion in Limine rulings, currently under submission. Counsel are advised that they can call Judge Wick in chamber if the need arises. Court will reconvene at 8:30AM on 12/18/02 to allow counsel to put any matters they might have on record, before a new jury panel arrives at approximately 9;15AM. The clerk works on finalizing the exhibit list and runs off revised copies for the Court, the reporter, and counsel. Withdrawn exhibits are recorded, and will be returned to counsel on 12/18/02.
